name: rabbit-feature
summary: Owns the rabbit-feature-touch orchestration skill plus the absorbed rabbit-feature-scope skill (with resolve-scope.py and format-feature-context.py scripts) and the absorbed rabbit-feature-spec skill (renamed from rabbit-spec) for spec authoring. Post-consolidation: the legacy rabbit-feature-scope and rabbit-spec feature directories are retired and absorbed artifacts under this feature are authoritative. Dispatcher-side surface; executor-side (dispatch-tdd-subagent.py and tdd-step.py) lives in tdd-subagent and tdd-state-machine respectively.
deprecation_criterion: When feature-touch orchestration is natively handled by the rabbit CLI or by Claude Code's native workflow mechanism.
spec_no_change_reason: Spec edit (Inv 34 + version bump) was committed in this cycle in 5c67be42; HEAD-diff is clean by design
